zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de l'Isle於1309年出生在英國奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾時，她的父親Warin de L'Isle24歲，母親Alice Tyeys23歲。她於1330年10月20日之後與John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1344年在英國德比夏爾可德諾享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de l'Isle于1309年出生在英国奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾时，她的父亲Warin de L'Isle24岁，母亲Alice Tyeys23岁。她于1330年10月20日之后与John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1344年在英国德比夏爾可德諾享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: l'Isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de l'Isle was born in 1309, in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Warin de L'Isle, was 24 and her mother, Alice Tyeys, was 23. She married John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor after 20 October 1330, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1344, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de l'Isle est née en 1309, à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Warin de L'Isle, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Tyeys, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor après 20 octobre 1330, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1344, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de l'Isle 1309 in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin de L'Isle 24 und ihre Mutter Alice Tyeys 23. Sie hat nach 20. Oktober 1330 in England John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1344 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

Lei sposato John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor dopo il 20 ottobre 1330, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1344, nel Codnor, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de l'Isleが1309年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベル オフ ウィト ホールゼで生まれた時，父Warin de L'Isleは24歳，母Alice Tyeysは23歳であった。1330年10月20日以後にイギリスでJohn de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1344年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで35歳で死去した。

ko.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de l'Isle(이)가 1309년 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de L'Isle(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Tyeys(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1330년 10월 20일 이후 영국에서 John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de l'Isle nasceu em 1309, em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de L'Isle, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Tyeys, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor após 20 de outubro de 1330, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1344, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de l'Isle родилась в 1309 г. в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Warin de L'Isle было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Tyeys, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor после 20 октябрь 1330 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1344 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

Se casó con John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor después de 20 de octubre de 1330, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1344, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
